name: Broccoli Ham Hot Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli according to package directions. Drain.
2. Spoon rice into a 13x9" baking pan.
3. Place broccoli over the rice.
4. Melt butter in a large skillet.
5. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons of melted butter over the bread crumbs and set aside.
6. In remaining butter, sauté onion until soft.
7. Add flour, salt, and pepper, stirring constantly until bubbly.
8. Stir in milk and continue cooking until sauce thickens and bubbles.
9. Cook and stir for one minute.
10. Add ham and heat through.
11. Pour over rice and broccoli.
12. Sprinkle the crumbs over all.
13. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until heated through.
14. Sprinkle with cheese.
15. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
